summary: Release workflow: triggers on tag push (v*.*.*) or workflow_dispatch. Builds for macOS-ARM64, macOS-x64, Linux-x64, Linux-ARM64, Windows-x64. Validates tag matches app version. Requires release-notes/vX.Y.Z.md file. Uses tauri-action with signing keys (TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY). Uploads to GitHub Releases.
